hero.sub: We design websites, AI agents, automations, and an omnichannel CRM that work together to capture, engage, and convert clients — without you doing anything manually.
hero.credibility: Web · AI Agents · Automation · Omnichannel CRM · Custom Software

blocks.question: Missing leads?
blocks.micro: When a client sends a message and no one responds within minutes, that client goes to your competitor.

blocks.question: Disconnected channels?
blocks.micro: WhatsApp, email, forms, social media — every channel is an island. Conversations get lost between tools.

blocks.question: All manual?
blocks.micro: Copying data between systems, following up manually, and booking one by one drains your time and causes costly mistakes.

blocks.question: No control?
blocks.micro: Without a system connecting your website, conversations, and processes, growth becomes chaos.

structure.sub: We connect your website, AI agents, automations, and CRM so every visitor gets an instant response and a clear path to becoming a client.

aiDemo.title: This is how your AI agent responds to clients.
aiDemo.sub: While you focus on what matters, the system responds, qualifies, and books — automatically, from any channel.

messages.text: Hi, I've had a toothache since last night. Do you have any availability today?
Hi there! So sorry to hear that. Yes, we have urgent care slots available today. How strong is the pain from 1 to 10?
About a 7. It gets worse with cold drinks.
Got it — that's really helpful info for the doctor. For today we have 3:00pm or 5:30pm available. Which works best for you?
Perfect. I've booked you with Dr. González today at 3:00pm. Can I get your full name to set up your record?
All set, Maria. Appointment confirmed for today at 3:00pm. I just sent you a text with the office address and what to bring. Feel better soon — see you shortly! ✓

control.title: When everything is connected, your business stops improvising.
control.sub: Visitors become leads. Leads get instant responses. Conversations are centralized. Clients are closed automatically.

engineering.sub: The same technical rigor we apply to enterprise platforms, now in service of your business. From a landing page to a complete system with AI, automation, and CRM.

milestones.title: First Enterprise Client
